s3.bucket.sourceselectioncriteria.CfnAbo: A container that describes additional filters for identifying the source objects that you want to replicate. You can choose to enable or disable the replication of these objects.

s3.bucket.sourceselectioncriteria.Replic.Description: A filter that you can specify for selection for modifications on replicas.

s3.bucket.sourceselectioncriteria.SseKms.Description: A container for filter information for the selection of Amazon S3 objects encrypted with AWS KMS.
